sections.heading: Overview
sections.paragraph: Rayca Precision and Data Powered Therapeutics have established a strategic co-development partnership aimed at advancing a new generation of nanobody therapeutics designed for cancers with high unmet need. This collaboration integrates Rayca Precision’s computational discovery engine, which utilizes structure-aware generative methods and free-energy screening, with Data Powered Therapeutics’ automated wet-lab platform capable of characterizing up to a thousand nanobody variants in parallel. A primary focus of the agreement involves targeted protein degradation through a nanobody bioPROTAC approach, addressing therapeutic challenges in oncology settings such as small cell lung cancer, resistant tumors, and neuroendocrine cancers including those metastasized to the brain. By prioritizing developability properties like expression and stability early in the design phase, the partnership seeks to mitigate late-stage attrition risks common in biologic development. While specific molecular targets remain confidential, the companies intend to advance lead programmes toward development candidates with first-in-class potential. This initiative underscores a shift in drug discovery where empirical evidence at scale complements computational modeling to resolve biophysical liabilities before clinical entry. The collaboration represents a significant business development in the PROTAC and nanobody space, leveraging combined intellectual property to tackle aggressive malignancies that evade standard therapies and immune system detection.

sources.label: Rayca Precision and Data Powered Therapeutics

points.text: Rayca Precision — Nanobody bioPROTAC — Cancers of high unmet need — Strategic co-development partnership announced.
Data Powered Therapeutics — Nanobody therapeutics platform — Oncology indications — High-throughput experimental validation integration.
Rayca Precision: Strategic objective to treat developability as primary using computational design; associated with nanobody bioPROTAC approach.
Data Powered Therapeutics: Strategic objective to automate wet-lab data generation at scale; associated with nanobody variant characterization platform.
Nanobody bioPROTAC: Targeted protein degradation mechanism; early discovery phase; indications include small cell lung cancer and neuroendocrine cancers; specific targets confidential.
Development Strategy: Computational design paired with high-throughput validation; focus on expression, stability, and solubility to resolve liabilities early.
Rayca Precision and Data Powered Therapeutics: Strategic co-development partnership to design and advance nanobody therapeutics; intends to expand portfolio over time.
